title: hieracium angustatum subsp. metaliceps
intro: Hieracium angustatum subsp. metaliceps is a subspecies of the Hieracium angustatum plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), which is a type of flowering plant. The medicinal properties of Hieracium angustatum subsp. metaliceps lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. This plant has been associated with several health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and aid in digestion, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. The herbal preparations of Hieracium angustatum subsp. metaliceps include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the plant parts and steeping them in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
